query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid (kommunenummer)

2.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in utlosningomr

3.description: select kvikkleire release areas (utlosningomr) filtered by the chosen high-risk class

4.description: reduce kvikkleire high-risk areas to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

5.description: select buildings in Trondheim municipality (by kommunenummer)

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced kvikkleire high-risk areas

7.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to the municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance
